zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon於大約1210年出生時，他的父親Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours26歲，母親Isabelle de TANCARVILLE31歲。他和Alix de Garlande至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1264年9月14日在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon于大约1210年出生时，他的父亲Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours26岁，母亲Isabelle de TANCARVILLE31岁。他和Alix de Garlande至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1264年9月14日在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

nameMeanings.name: 'the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Old'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse personal name, originally perhaps a byname, derived from oddr ‘point (of a weapon)’. Occasionally in modern use it may also be a short form of compound names with this as the first element, such as Oddbjørn (+ ‘bear’).

en.lifeSummary: When Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon was born about 1210, his father, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, was 26 and his mother, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, was 31. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Alix de Garlande. He died on 14 September 1264, in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon est né environ 1210, son père, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Alix de Garlande. Il est décédé le 14 septembre 1264, à Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon um 1210 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours 26 und seine Mutter Isabelle de TANCARVILLE 31. Er hatte mit Alix de Garlande mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. September 1264 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon è nato il circa 1210, il suo padre, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Alix de Garlande. Morì il 14 settembre 1264, nel Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéonが約1210年に生まれた時，父Adam I De Villebeon De Nemoursは26歳，母Isabelle de TANCARVILLEは31歳であった。彼はAlix de Garlandeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1264年9月14日にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon(이)가 대략 1210년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de TANCARVILLE(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Alix de Garlande(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1264년 9월 14일 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon nasceu aproximadamente 1210, seu pai, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Alix de Garlande. Ele faleceu em 14 de setembro de 1264, em Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon родился около 1210 г., его отцу по имени Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, 31. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Alix de Garlande. Он умер 14 сентября 1264 г. в местности чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam II 'the Old' de Villebéon nació aproximadamente 1210, su papá, Adam I De Villebeon De Nemours, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabelle de TANCARVILLE, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Alix de Garlande. Murió el 14 de septiembre de 1264, en Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, a la edad de 55 años.
